mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs
cp <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/kwok.yaml <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/kwok.yaml
mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components
nerdctl \
  info \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/nerdctl-info.txt \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-etcd \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/etcd.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-apiserver \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-apiserver.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-controller-manager \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-controller-manager.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-scheduler \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-scheduler.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kwok-controller \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kwok-controller.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-metrics-server \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/metrics-server.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-prometheus \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/prometheus.log \
  2>&1
nerdctl \
  logs \
  kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-jaeger \
  ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/jaeger.log \
  2>&1
